svg.title: artefakt logo system — sans serif exploration
svg.desc: Six logo directions for artefakt, all sans serif, with wordmark, mark, and colour variants
svg.text: artefakt — logo system / sans serif exploration
Helvetica Neue Bold · uppercase · red F as cut · tracking -2
Works at any scale. F break is a typographic splice, not a decoration.
B — lowercase grotesque / open tracking / Bayer principle
Helvetica Neue Light · lowercase · tracked wide · a stillness
The f interruption is quieter — reads as a breathing pause, not a shout.
C — mark + wordmark / contact frame registration
Mark = contact sheet registration corner. 'a' = lowercase per Bayer.
Corner squares are the film frame anchors — red, like the safelight.
D — horizontal rule system / IIT grid logic
Red bar above = the safelight. Structure before content.
Wordmark is bold grotesque, lowercase. Bar width = wordmark width.
E — vertical cut / the dismantled wordmark
The red cut = the splice point. Conceptually: the demolished and the rebuilt.
Two fragments. One name. The organisation lives in the cut.
F — monospaced / the archive catalogue voice
IBM Plex Mono — already in the system. Technical, archival. The machine.
Reads as a catalogue entry or a film edge. Strong at small sizes.
